# Payments Checklist: PayFast Card Integration

**Purpose**: Validate the completeness, clarity, consistency, and measurability of payment-integrity and operational-safety requirements for PayFast wallet top-ups.
**Created**: 2026-04-03
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are requirements defined for both checkout initiation and settlement acceptance of the card-only rule, rather than only for the hosted payment screen? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003, Spec §FR-007]
- [x] CHK002 Are acceptable top-up amount bounds, currency precision, and invalid-amount outcomes fully specified for the "valid amount" entry flow? [Gap, Spec §User Story 1, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK003 Does the spec define which identifiers and matching rules make a PayFast result a confident match to a pending top-up attempt? [Clarity, Spec §FR-005, Spec §FR-007, Spec §Payment Confirmation Record]
- [x] CHK004 Are lifecycle states and their entry or terminal conditions fully documented for pending, completed, cancelled, expired, abandoned, and not-confirmed outcomes? [Completeness, Spec §FR-009]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK005 Is "trustworthy successful PayFast result" clarified into explicit authoritative signals versus non-authoritative signals? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-005, Spec §User Story 2]
- [x] CHK006 Is "clear outcome" defined precisely enough to separate owner-facing statuses from internal reconciliation or diagnostic states? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-009, Spec §FR-012]
- [x] CHK007 Is "user-friendly failure messaging" bounded clearly enough to show what may be disclosed to owners versus what must remain hidden? [Clarity, Spec §FR-012]
- [x] CHK008 Is "for their own wallet only" defined consistently enough for initiation, history, result pages, and unmatched-return handling? [Clarity, Spec §FR-001, Spec §FR-013]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK009 Do the amount-crediting requirements align on how requested amount, confirmed charged amount, and any unsupported amount variations are handled? [Consistency, Spec §FR-004, Spec §FR-006, Spec §Assumptions]
- [x] CHK010 Are the non-crediting outcome classes consistent across acceptance scenarios, edge cases, FR-007, and SC-003? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 2, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-007, Spec §SC-003]
- [x] CHK011 Is the authoritative settlement source described consistently enough that browser return traffic cannot be misread as sufficient for wallet crediting? [Consistency, Spec §FR-005, Spec §FR-009, Ambiguity]
- [x] CHK012 Are privacy-safe generic return requirements consistent with the requirement to show owners a clear outcome without exposing foreign-attempt details? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 2, Spec §FR-009, Spec §FR-012, Spec §FR-013]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK013 Can the "100% credit card only" success criterion be measured objectively with a defined evidence source and scope? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001]
- [x] CHK014 Is the "within 1 minute for at least 95%" outcome anchored to a clearly defined start event, end event, and measurement window? [Clarity, Spec §SC-002]
- [x] CHK015 Is "without support intervention" defined with measurable inclusion and exclusion rules for assisted versus unassisted completion? [Ambiguity, Spec §SC-004]
- [x] CHK016 Are audit-trace success criteria specific enough to identify exactly which records must link together during settlement review? [Measurability, Spec §FR-010, Spec §SC-005]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK017 Are requirements specified for unmatched, foreign-owner, and already-finalized return scenarios beyond simply "no wallet credit occurs"? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 2, Spec §Edge Cases, Gap]
- [x] CHK018 Are recovery requirements defined for owners who leave PayFast and later return to check status without a fresh confirmation event? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases, Gap]
- [x] CHK019 Are late-arriving confirmation requirements defined for attempts already marked cancelled, expired, or otherwise finalized? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases, Gap]
- [x] CHK020 Do the requirements distinguish gateway downtime from merchant misconfiguration, with explicit expected outcomes for owners and operators? [Completeness, Spec §User Story 3, Spec §FR-012, Gap]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [x] CHK021 Are amount-mismatch requirements explicit about overpayment, underpayment, and invalid confirmed amounts, rather than only stating that confirmed amount wins when payment succeeds? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-006, Spec §Edge Cases, Gap]
- [x] CHK022 Are duplicate and conflicting evidence scenarios covered for both repeated success and mixed-status signals for the same attempt? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-008, Spec §Edge Cases, Gap]
- [x] CHK023 Are non-credit-card settlement attempts covered at both checkout bypass and postback-evidence stages? [Coverage, Spec §FR-003, Spec §FR-007, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK024 Are privacy requirements explicit about which payment-related data may be stored, displayed, or logged, especially for unmatched returns and failure paths? [Non-Functional, Gap, Spec §FR-012, Spec §Payment Confirmation Record]
- [x] CHK025 Are EF Core and DynamoDB parity expectations expressed as feature requirements or acceptance criteria, rather than only as planning notes? [Gap, Assumption]
- [x] CHK026 Are rollback or recovery expectations documented for partially persisted payment evidence, audit links, or wallet state when settlement processing fails mid-flow? [Gap, Exception Flow]
- [x] CHK027 Are operational-readiness requirements defined for callback reachability, credential changes, and settlement alerting, or are these intentionally excluded? [Gap, Non-Functional]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK028 Are PayFast merchant-account, ZAR-only, and out-of-scope dispute-handling assumptions validated or converted into explicit boundary requirements? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions]
- [x] CHK029 Are owner-filtering and privacy expectations traceable to explicit requirements for all result-page and support-facing scenarios? [Dependency, Spec §FR-013, Gap]
- [x] CHK030 Are Manual Test Gate and constitution-compliance expectations intentionally outside feature requirements, or should any release-readiness obligations be stated explicitly? [Gap, Assumption]

## Matching & Trust Boundaries

- [x] CHK031 Is the spec explicit about which combination of merchant reference, owner binding, amount comparison, and server-side validation checks is sufficient for a "validated" or "confident" PayFast match? [Ambiguity, Spec §User Story 2, Spec §FR-005, Spec §FR-015, Gap]
- [x] CHK032 Are the exact-match rules required for owner-visible result disclosure consistent with the exact-match rules required for wallet-credit authorization, so a browser return cannot qualify for one but not the other without being specified? [Consistency, Spec §FR-005, Spec §FR-013, Spec §FR-015, Ambiguity]

## Lifecycle & Outcome Definitions

- [x] CHK033 Are entry conditions, terminality, and allowed follow-up transitions defined for cancelled, expired, abandoned, unverified, and "not confirmed" outcomes, especially when late authoritative evidence arrives? [Completeness, Spec §FR-009, Spec §Edge Cases, Gap]
- [x] CHK034 Does the spec distinguish whether "Top-up not confirmed" is a user-facing message family, a lifecycle state, or both, so reviewers can map FR-009 and FR-015 without interpretation? [Clarity, Spec §FR-009, Spec §FR-015, Ambiguity]
- [x] CHK035 Are timeout or closure rules specified for when a pending or unverified attempt becomes abandoned versus expired if no authoritative PayFast confirmation is received? [Gap, Spec §FR-009, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Success Criteria Precision

- [x] CHK036 Is SC-001 measurable across both checkout initiation and settlement acceptance paths, rather than only the hosted page presentation, with a defined evidence source for "100%"? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001, Spec §FR-003, Spec §FR-007]
- [x] CHK037 Does SC-004 define the user-acceptance sample, denominator, and what counts as "support intervention" versus permitted guidance, so the 90% threshold is reproducible? [Ambiguity, Spec §SC-004]
- [x] CHK038 Does SC-005 specify the minimum trace chain and review scope required to prove traceability for every successful wallet credit? [Clarity, Spec §SC-005, Spec §FR-010, Gap]

## Security, Operations & Parity

- [x] CHK039 Are EF Core and DynamoDB parity expectations for owner filtering, evidence persistence, and exactly-once settlement stated as feature requirements or acceptance criteria rather than only in plan/tasks? [Gap, Spec §FR-010, Spec §FR-013, Assumption]
- [x] CHK040 Are payment-data handling requirements explicit about prohibiting storage or exposure of PAN, CVV, expiry, and raw gateway diagnostics, instead of leaving these protections only to planning constraints? [Gap, Spec §FR-012, Ambiguity]
- [x] CHK041 Are spec-level operational requirements defined for externally reachable `notify_url`, callback validation evidence, and merchant-misconfiguration handling, or are these intentionally left as implementation-only concerns? [Gap, Spec §User Story 3, Spec §FR-012, Spec §SC-005]

## Final Alignment Checks

- [x] CHK042 Is "user-friendly failure messaging" defined with concrete owner-safe expectations or example outcomes for both start-failure and not-confirmed scenarios, rather than relying on the adjective "user-friendly" alone? [Clarity, Spec §FR-012, Spec §User Story 2, Spec §User Story 3]
- [x] CHK043 Does SC-004 specify the evidence-capture and sign-off expectation for the 20-attempt sample, so the required measurement can be reviewed consistently and not just described abstractly? [Measurability, Spec §SC-004, Spec §Success Criteria, Gap]
- [x] CHK044 Are the terms "Payment Confirmation Record" and authoritative `PaymentReturnEvidence` explicitly aligned so reviewers can trace the same audit artifact consistently across requirements, entities, and downstream design docs? [Consistency, Spec §Key Entities, Spec §FR-010, Spec §SC-005]
- [x] CHK045 Are relational-schema change requirements explicit enough that migration-backed persistence changes are unambiguously required wherever new payment audit fields or records are introduced? [Completeness, Spec §FR-019, Spec §FR-021, Assumption]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
- Reconciled on 2026-04-03 against the current `spec.md`; checklist state now reflects the updated requirements and no stale unchecked items remain.
